competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
fetched_urls: WebSearch: OpenAI ChatGPT Canvas Projects new features agent tasks 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: ChatGPT Remote control Windows devices announcement date (ok)
WebSearch: Canvas no longer available GPT-5.5 Instant Thinking date (ok)
WebSearch: GPT-5.6 Sol preview date June 2026 OpenAI (ok)
WebSearch: workspace agents in ChatGPT Codex announcement date (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1+2 (RSS, HN Algolia) blocked with 403. Tier3 WebSearch succeeded. Confirmed: Canvas removed from GPT-5.5 Instant/Thinking as of ~May 28, 2026 (not new, predates baseline window). Codex Windows remote control announced May 29, 2026 (not new). NEW: OpenAI previewed GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna) on June 26, 2026 — limited preview to ~20 pre-approved orgs at US government request, citing 'most robust safety stack to date.' GPT-5.6 introduces 'ultra mode that goes beyond a single-agent setup by using subagents to accelerate complex work' and a new max reasoning effort tier. Also June 27: ChatGPT Business/Enterprise/Edu rolled out a simplified model picker (speed vs reasoning effort tiers), removing 'Thinking Light' option. No 6/27 or 6/28-dated Canvas/agent/session/workspace items found beyond GPT-5.6.
competitors.content_hash: Tier1+2 (RSS, HN Algolia) blocked with 403. Tier3 WebSearch succeeded. Confirmed: Canvas removed from GPT-5.5 Instant/Thinking as of ~May 28, 2026 (not new, predates b

changes.description: OpenAI began limited preview of GPT-5.6 (Sol/Terra/Luna) on 2026-06-26, introducing an 'ultra mode' that orchestrates multiple subagents instead of a single agent, plus a new max reasoning effort tier.
changes.evidence: 「introducing a new ultra mode that goes beyond single agent capabilities by leveraging subagents to accelerate complex work」
changes.source_url: https://openai.com/index/previewing-gpt-5-6-sol/ (WebSearch转述，原文本次403未能直接核实)
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'ultra mode'是单一产品内的多subagent编排，朝着多agent协同方向延伸，与meee2锚点(1)有方向性但非结构性重叠——仍是同一AI产品内部调度，不是人=慢session/AI=快session的对称协议，人也未进入agent图。

changes.description: ChatGPT Business/Enterprise/Edu rolled out a simplified model picker on 2026-06-27 across web/iOS/Android, consolidating speed-vs-reasoning-effort tiers and removing a 'Thinking Light' option.
changes.evidence: 「simplified model picker on web, iOS, and Android that makes it easier to choose between speed and reasoning effort」

key_findings: Tier 1（openai.com RSS、HN Algolia）本次仍全部403，完全依赖Tier 3 WebSearch
baseline两条待核实线索本次均已确认日期早于6/26窗口（Canvas移除~5/28、Windows远程控制~5/29），非本次新变化
新发现：GPT-5.6（Sol/Terra/Luna）于6/26开始限量预览（约20家政府预批准机构），核心为'ultra mode'多subagent编排，判定为方向性信号但非meee2核心抽象的结构性重叠
6/27模型选择器UI简化属界面调整，无meee2相关性

competitors.raw_snapshot: All Tier1/Tier2 direct fetches (HN Algolia, windsurf.com/changelog, docs.devin.ai/desktop/changelog, docs.devin.ai/release-notes/overview) returned HTTP 403. Tier3 WebSearch across 5 queries (general June 2026 update, Cascade EOL status, news dated 6/27, new feature announcements this week, Devin 2.2) all surfaced only already-known baseline facts: Windsurf->Devin Desktop rebrand (6/2/2026), Agent Command Center as default Kanban surface, Spaces for shared context, ACP support (Codex/Claude Agent/OpenCode), Devin Local (Rust rewrite of Cascade, ~30% more token-efficient, subagents), and Cascade EOL confirmed still 7/1/2026 with no change to that date. One unrelated item found: Devin 2.2 (desktop testing/computer-use, 3x faster boot, PR self-review) released 2/24/2026 — predates baseline window and is a Devin product update, not Devin Desktop/Windsurf-specific; not counted as new.

competitors.content_hash: CHANGELOG.md（官方一手，直接抓取成功）确认最新版本仍为v2.1.195，与baseline完全一致，无更新版本。/design-sync仍维持6/17发布时的beta范围；未检索到超出Design↔Code或脱离beta

未发现任何2026-06-27或06-28日期的新内容
锚点(5)方向未发现新动态，与baseline一致

competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1/2直连（HN Algolia x2、superwhisper.com/changelog）全部403。Tier3 WebSearch通过releasebot.io等聚合器找到一条2026-06-17的更新：'Superwhisper adds a copy button for code snippets in agent responses, refines the Coding agent panel and key UI views, and fixes transcription, window behavior, and Claude Code integration issues'。无法核实具体版本号（官方页面403）。其他检索结果均复述baseline已知信息（2.16.0于6/9；Cursor/Claude Code/Open Code/Amp/Codex集成可追溯至v2.13.0于4/24；2月已支持Gemini/Grok/OpenAI/Anthropic模型）。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1/2直连（HN Algolia x2、superwhisper.com/changelog）全部403。Tier3 WebSearch通过releasebot.io等聚合器找到一条2026-06-17的更新：'Superwhisper adds a copy button for code snippe

changes.description: Superwhisper于2026-06-17更新打磨'Coding agent panel'界面并新增agent响应代码片段复制按钮，同时修复Claude Code集成相关问题
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper adds a copy button for code snippets in agent responses, refines the Coding agent panel」
changes.source_url: https://releasebot.io/updates/superwhisper（聚合器转述，superwhisper.com原文本次403未能直接核实）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：这是对现有'语音驱动coding agent+查看/复制agent文本响应'交互的渐进打磨，未引入跨工具live link、descriptive canvas或人机对称协议等结构性新能力，与meee2锚点重叠度仍低

key_findings: 新发现：2026-06-17更新打磨Coding agent panel并新增代码片段复制按钮，属现有语音驱动agent交互的增量优化，非结构性新能力
无法直接核实具体版本号或官方changelog逐字原文，superwhisper.com与HN Algolia本次均403，结论依赖releasebot.io聚合器转述
未发现任何触碰meee2锚点（live link、descriptive-first、cross-owner pull、菜单栏对称协议）的新动态，威胁等级维持lo

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
fetched_urls: WebSearch: new AI workspace productivity tool launch 2026 site:producthunt.com (ok)
WebSearch: "Aurora Notch" Product Hunt Mac notch workspace features (ok)
WebSearch: "Buddy AI Note" Product Hunt features daily memo plan (ok)
WebSearch: "MD+HTML Reader" Product Hunt review AI-generated markdown workspace (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1/2全部403，转Tier3 WebSearch。本次PH搜索命中多数为已知产品（Adapt、Kollab、Mindstone Rebel、Prism、MeshPilot、1DevTool），另发现三款未见过的新产品：Aurora Notch（Mac notch私人工作区——笔记/剪贴板/日历/专注计时器，本机AI摘要，单用户，无跨工具link）；Buddy AI Note（每日备忘录转计划——书写/口述一天安排，敏感步骤如发邮件/邀请会暂停等待人工审核）；MD+HTML Reader（macOS只读工作区，用于在commit/交接前审阅AI agent生成的Markdown/HTML文件，单一本地文件夹，无live sync）。三者均命中恰好2个watch_keywords但均不构成meee2锚点的结构性重叠：均为单用户/本地化，无跨工具实时artifact link，无菜单栏5字戳session机制，无人在agent图内的对称协议。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1/2全部403，转Tier3 WebSearch。本次PH搜索命中多数为已知产品（Adapt、Kollab、Mindstone Rebel、Prism、MeshPilot、1DevTool），另发现三款未见过的新产品：Aurora Notch（M

changes.description: Aurora Notch——Mac顶部notch生产力工作区，含笔记/剪贴板/日历/专注计时器与本机AI摘要，命中2个watch_keywords但不建议加入sources.json
changes.evidence: 「A private notch workspace for every Mac」

changes.description: Buddy AI Note——将书写/口述笔记转为可执行计划的每日备忘录应用，敏感步骤暂停等待人工审核，命中2个watch_keywords但不建议加入sources.json
changes.evidence: 「Anything that goes to another person...pauses and says 'Will be sent to others, review first.'」

changes.description: MD+HTML Reader——专用macOS工作区，用于在commit/下一步提示/交接前以只读方式审阅AI agent生成的Markdown/HTML文件，命中2个watch_keywords但不建议加入sources.json
changes.evidence: 「Review AI-generated Markdown and HTML in a focused workspace」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：审阅AI agent产出的工作区表层上与meee2的artifact场景相关，但是静态本地文件查看器，无live link机制，结构重叠度低

key_findings: Tier1/2全部403，依赖WebSearch完成本次扫描
三款新候选（Aurora Notch、Buddy AI Note、MD+HTML Reader）均命中恰好2个watch_keywords，达到候选筛选阈值，但经RULE 5结构性核查均不建议纳入sources.json
MD+HTML Reader在精神上与meee2审阅agent产出最接近，但是单文件夹静态查看器而非live link，未达结构性重叠
已知产品（Adapt/Kollab/Mindstone Rebel/Prism/MeshPilot/1DevTool）本次再次出现但无功能变化迹象，按指令不重复标注

alerts.headline: OpenAI开始限量预览GPT-5.6（Sol/Terra/Luna），新增多subagent编排的'ultra mode'
alerts.evidence: 「introducing a new ultra mode that goes beyond single agent capabilities by leveraging subagents to accelerate complex work」
alerts.action_suggestion: GPT-5.6的'ultra mode'目前是单一产品内的多subagent调度，由OpenAI内部编排，不是人在agent图内、也非人=慢session/AI=快session的对称协议。建议持续关注该预览（当前仅限~20家政府预批准机构）扩大可用范围后，其subagent编排是否会进一步暴露人机协同接口，并在meee2传播中强调'人在协议内对称参与'与'纯AI内部多agent调度'的本质差异。

alerts.headline: Gemini Enterprise Agent Designer可视化flow builder及Agent Sharing功能据搜索结果已转为GA
alerts.evidence: 「Agent Designer visual flow builder is available for all agents created before January 12, 2026...This feature is generally available (GA)」
alerts.action_suggestion: Agent Designer是显式拖拽设计的flow构建器，与meee2'descriptive-first：flow从真实行为emerge'的设计理念方向相反，可作为差异化传播素材（设计优先 vs 行为优先）。证据强度有限（本次为WebSearch转述，原文未直接核实），建议下次报告尝试直连Google官方文档复核GA状态及具体细节。
